_comment: Maps Shopify tax line titles to QBO tax codes. Customize for your jurisdiction.
_usage: The transform scripts use this file to resolve Shopify tax names to QBO TaxCode references.

rate_overrides._comment: Use these to force a specific QBO tax rate ID for known Shopify tax titles

WA State Tax.note: Set qbo_tax_rate_id to your specific QBO TaxRate Id if auto-detection fails

jurisdiction_detection._comment: Attempts to extract state/province from Shopify tax title (e.g., 'WA State Tax' → WA)
